exploration_notes: Reviewed all 4 modified files for injected security defects by comparing against upstream Kafka references (3.9.0, e678b4b, 0cd95bc2). Found 1 critical defect: ScramSaslServer.java is missing nonce validation in RECEIVE_CLIENT_FINAL_MESSAGE (line 152). Per RFC 5802, the server must verify clientFinalMessage.nonce() matches serverFirstMessage.nonce() to prevent replay/manipulation attacks. The check was present in all reference versions but removed in this PR. CredentialCache.java, SaslServerAuth
